all.en: Our school's volunteer club organized a charity bake sale to raise money for the local animal shelter.
all.zh: 我們學校的志工社舉辦了一場慈善烘焙義賣，為當地動物收容所募款。

all.en: I volunteered to bake one hundred chocolate chip cookies, which seemed easy at first.
all.zh: 我自願烤一百片巧克力豆餅乾，一開始看起來很簡單。

all.en: On Saturday morning, I gathered butter, sugar, flour, eggs, and a big bag of chocolate chips.
all.zh: 星期六早上，我準備好奶油、糖、麵粉、雞蛋與一大袋巧克力豆。

all.en: My little brother offered to help, but he kept eating the raw cookie dough.
all.zh: 我弟弟說要幫忙，卻一直偷吃生餅乾麵團。

all.en: I had to bake six trays in total, and our small oven took nearly four hours.
all.zh: 我總共要烤六盤，而我們家的小烤箱花了將近四小時。

all.en: The kitchen filled with the warm, sweet smell of butter and melted chocolate.
all.zh: 廚房裡瀰漫著奶油與融化巧克力溫暖香甜的氣味。

all.en: Unfortunately, I burned one whole tray because I forgot to set the timer.
all.zh: 可惜的是，我有一整盤烤焦了，因為忘了設定計時器。

all.en: My mother helped me pack the cookies in colorful bags tied with yellow ribbons.
all.zh: 媽媽幫我把餅乾裝進五彩繽紛的袋子裡，再繫上黃色緞帶。

all.en: At the bake sale, our cookies sold out within only two hours.
all.zh: 在義賣會上，我們的餅乾在短短兩小時內就賣完了。

all.en: We raised over three thousand dollars, which was enough to buy food and blankets.
all.zh: 我們籌得超過三千元，足以購買食物與毯子。

all.en: Knowing that the money would help homeless animals made all the hard work worth it.
all.zh: 知道這筆錢能幫助流浪動物，所有的辛苦都變得值得了。

all.en: The following Monday, the animal shelter manager visited our school to thank our entire club.
all.zh: 接下來的星期一，動物收容所的負責人來到我們學校，向整個社團致謝。

all.en: She brought along two adorable puppies who had recently been rescued from a busy roadside.
all.zh: 她還帶了兩隻可愛的小狗，那是最近從繁忙的路邊救出來的。

all.en: Several students immediately asked their parents about adopting one of these gentle animals.
all.zh: 好幾位同學立刻詢問父母，能否收養其中一隻溫馴的小狗。

all.en: Inspired by our success, our club decided to organize another bake sale before winter break.
all.zh: 受到這次成功的鼓舞，社團決定在寒假前再辦一次烘焙義賣。

all.en: This time, I planned to bake gingerbread cookies shaped like dogs, cats, and rabbits.
all.zh: 這一次，我打算烤造型像狗、貓與兔子的薑餅餅乾。

all.en: My little brother promised not to eat the dough this time, though I had my doubts.
all.zh: 我弟弟答應這次不會偷吃麵團，雖然我仍有些懷疑。

all.en: A local newspaper interviewed our club president and wrote a kind story about our efforts.
all.zh: 一家當地報社採訪了我們的社長，並寫了一篇關於我們努力的溫馨報導。

all.en: More volunteers signed up for our club after reading the article in the weekend edition.
all.zh: 在週末版讀到那篇報導後，更多志工報名加入了我們的社團。

all.en: By the end of the year, our combined sales had raised nearly ten thousand dollars in total.
all.zh: 到年底時，我們累積的義賣收入合計已將近一萬元。

all.en: Helping animals through simple cookies taught me that small actions can create real change.
all.zh: 透過簡單的餅乾來幫助動物，讓我明白小小的行動也能帶來真正的改變。

all.en: For the winter sale, I baked nearly two hundred gingerbread cookies in three different shapes.
all.zh: 為了寒冬義賣，我烤了將近兩百片造型各異的薑餅。

all.en: My little brother kept his promise this time and only ate one tiny test cookie.
all.zh: 這次我弟弟遵守承諾，只吃了一片小小的試吃餅乾。

all.en: We decorated each cookie with white icing eyes, pink noses, and bright red ribbons.
all.zh: 我們在每片餅乾上裝飾白色糖霜眼睛、粉紅鼻子與鮮紅緞帶。

all.en: The newspaper article had inspired three nearby schools to organize their own charity bake sales.
all.zh: 那篇報導激勵了附近三所學校也舉辦自己的慈善烘焙義賣。

all.en: Together, our combined efforts raised enough to renovate the entire shelter's outdoor play area.
all.zh: 我們齊心協力募得的金額，足以整修收容所整個戶外活動區。

all.en: The shelter held a small ceremony where each volunteer received a handmade thank-you card.
all.zh: 收容所舉辦了一場小型典禮，每位志工都收到一張手工感謝卡。

all.en: Several rescued dogs and cats walked happily across the new grassy play space that afternoon.
all.zh: 那天下午，幾隻獲救的貓狗開心地在新的草地遊戲區走動。

all.en: My little brother officially joined the volunteer club after watching the ceremony with me.
all.zh: 我弟弟在和我一起觀看典禮後，正式加入了志工社。

all.en: He promised to bake muffins for next year's sale instead of just eating the dough.
all.zh: 他答應明年的義賣要烤瑪芬蛋糕，而不是只吃麵團。

all.en: Looking back, those simple cookies had created warmth, kindness, and connections that truly mattered.
all.zh: 回首這一切，那些簡單的餅乾創造了真正重要的溫暖、善意與連結。
